---
title: Semantic-Aware Virtual Reality Video Streaming
author:
- Yue Leng
- Chi-Chun Chen
- Qiuyue Sun
- Jian Huang
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3265723.3265738
journ: APSys
year: 2018
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 22
---
